patches.source: Asian Market: Key Project Layout Its business covers Asian countries such as Laos, India, Indonesia, the Philippines, and Malaysia, and it has implemented multiple large-scale power station projects, such as several 660MW, 300MW, and 150MW coal-fired power stations.
patches.translation:
Asian Market: Key Project Layout
Its business covers Asian countries such as Laos, India, Indonesia, the Philippines, and
Malaysia, and it has implemented multiple large-scale power station projects, such as
several 660MW, 300MW, and 150MW coal-fired power stations.

patches.source: African Market: Energy Project Expansion It has carried out hydropower and thermal power projects in African countries such as Nigeria and Algeria, including waste-to-energy power station projects, contributing to local energy development.
patches.translation:
African Market: Energy Project Expansion
It has carried out hydropower and thermal power projects in African countries such as
Nigeria and Algeria, including
waste-to-energy power station projects, contributing to local energy development.

patches.source: 170MW hydropower station and multiple gas and
patches.translation: 170MW hydropower station and multiple gas and

patches.source: South American Market: Deepening Engineering Cooperation It has entered South American countries such as Brazil and Venezuela, and participated in multiple projects such as oil refining in South American countries.
patches.translation:
South American Market: Deepening Engineering Cooperation
It has entered South American countries such as Brazil and Venezuela, and participated
in multiple projects such as oil refining in South American countries.

patches.source: The projects are spread across more than countries and regions in Asia, Africa, and South America, with contracted contract value exceeding billion dollars. It has successively constructed multiple coal-fired power stations, gas-fired (combined cycle), hydropower stations, waste incineration and new energy power generation projects (photovoltaic power generation, wind power generation and energy storage).
patches.translation:
The projects are spread across more than countries and regions in Asia, Africa, and South
America, with contracted contract value exceeding billion dollars. It has successively constructed multiple coal-fired
power stations, gas-fired (combined cycle), hydropower stations, waste incineration and new energy power
generation projects (photovoltaic power generation, wind power generation and energy storage).
